footer.descripcion: You can reach us through social media, WhatsApp, or by visiting us at our location.
footer.direccion: 1a Calle Oriente, Barrio El Centro El Refugio, Ahuachapán Norte

descripcion.parrafo1: Canaan Assemblies of God Church is a Christian community dedicated to sharing the gospel message of Jesus Christ with love, faith and commitment.
descripcion.parrafo2: Our purpose is to guide every person to have a personal relationship with God, grow spiritually and live according to the principles of the word of God.
descripcion.parrafo3: In our church we believe that every person has a special purpose in God's plan. That's why we work through different ministries to reach children, youth and adults.
descripcion.cita: "For where two or three are gathered together in my name, there am I in the midst of them." - Matthew 18:20

fe.descripcion: We believe in Jesus Christ as our Lord and Savior and in the authority of the Bible as the word of God.

comunidad.descripcion: We are a spiritual family where every person is welcome and can grow in their faith.

mision.descripcion: To preach the gospel, disciple believers and serve our community.

servicios.subtitulo: You can join us for all of our services.

eventos.lunes: New Generations, Joint Service of Little Missionaries and Explorers
eventos.miercoles: Prayer and intercession at the church and live broadcast on Facebook of Connected with God

ubicacion.descripcion: We are located at 1a Calle Oriente, Barrio El Centro El Refugio, Ahuachapán Norte. We look forward to worshiping together. You can visit us at the address shown below.

hero.parrafo1: An international Assemblies of God ministry dedicated to evangelizing, equipping and empowering the new generation of boys and girls.
hero.parrafo2: We build character through discipline, responsibility and biblical values since 1962, walking alongside every child and young person on their journey of faith.
hero.cita: Ready for anything! Ready to work, play, serve, worship, live and obey the word of God.
hero.fotoAlt: Children and leaders of Explorers of the King at a New Generations service

limpio.descripcion: Clean in body, mind and speech.

honrado.descripcion: Does not lie, cheat, or steal.

valiente.descripcion: Brave despite danger, criticism or threats.

leal.descripcion: Loyal to the church, family, troop and friends.

cortes.descripcion: Polite, kind and helpful at all times.

espiritual.descripcion: Prays, reads the Bible and shares their faith.

significadoEmblema.titulo: A compass that points to Christ
significadoEmblema.parrafo: The design is based on the cardinal points, to remind us to always direct our attention to Jesus.
significadoEmblema.fotoAlt: Compass of the Explorers of the King emblem

dorados.texto: They represent the four aspects of a young person's growth: physical, spiritual, mental and social.

rojos.texto: They represent the four main teachings of the Church: Salvation, Baptism in the Holy Spirit, Divine Healing and the Second Coming.

azules.texto: They represent the Code of Explorers of the King: alert, clean, honest, brave, loyal, courteous, obedient and spiritual.

navegantes.descripcion: A weekly program with a deep effect on the youngest ones: they are the foundation, navigators at their best.

pioneros.descripcion: They begin to take interest in outdoor activities: hiking, camping and exploration.

seguidoresDeLaSenda.descripcion: We walk alongside them through a stage of many changes with evangelism, teaching and recreation.

exploradores.descripcion: Personal growth and leadership through action challenges, Christian service and outdoor life.

senoritas.descripcion: Girls and young women take part with the same opportunities and rights, according to their age.

uneteExplo.parrafo: Become part of Explorers of the King. We build character, discipline and purpose every Monday at 6:00 PM at Canaan Church.

hero.parrafo1: Little Missionaries is a Christian Assemblies of God ministry that seeks to form and disciple girls and young women in the Word of God.
hero.parrafo2: Its purpose is to guide them toward well-rounded growth — spiritual, physical, mental and social — so they become witnesses of Christ and leaders in their churches.

objetivos.ganar: Win girls and young women for Christ.
objetivos.ensenar: Teach the Bible and build solid foundations of faith.
objetivos.promover: Promote values such as kindness, service, love and testimony.
objetivos.preparar: Prepare them to serve in missions and Christian leadership.

hero.fotoAlt: Girls and leaders of Little Missionaries at a church activity

divisiones.parrafo: Each division has its own color band, materials and motto, walking alongside each girl according to her stage of growth.

arcoIris.descripcion: The youngest members of the ministry, taking their first steps in knowing God through play and Bible stories.

margaritas.descripcion: Girls who are beginning to grow in faith, learning Christian values and habits in a simple and joyful way.

rosas.descripcion: Charm and purity in a stage of change: strengthening their identity and personal relationship with Christ.

estrellas.descripcion: Stars and Honor Stars prepare for leadership, service and testimony within the church.

divisiones.notaFinal: There are more departments within Little Missionaries; for now we work with these four.

banderaCristiana.texto: I pledge allegiance to the Christian flag and to the Savior for whose kingdom it stands: one brotherhood uniting all true believers in service and in love.

banderaMisioneritas.titulo: Pledge to the Little Missionaries Flag
banderaMisioneritas.texto: I pledge allegiance to the Little Missionaries flag, and with God's help I will do everything I can to hold high the ideals of Little Missionaries, to be a faithful steward of my time, talent and money, to exercise my ministry on behalf of others, to abide in Him through prayer and Bible study, and to bear witness as a little missionary.

biblia.texto: I pledge allegiance to the Bible, God's Holy Word. I will make it a lamp unto my feet and a light unto my path, and treasure its words in my heart, so that I may not sin against God.

codigoLema.cita: "Whatever is true, whatever is honest, whatever is just, whatever is pure, whatever is lovely, whatever is of good report; if there be any virtue, and if there be any praise, think on these things."

hoy.texto: Thousands of groups and leaders across several countries, becoming a fundamental ministry in churches.

unete.parrafo: Become part of this ministry for girls and young women. We build character, faith and leadership at every gathering at Canaan Church.
